name: lightmem
description: Structured, team-shareable project memory for Codex CLI and Claude Code. Hooks maintain it; skills curate it.

interface.shortDescription: Structured project memory for Codex CLI and Claude Code.
interface.longDescription: LightMem keeps durable project memory in .claude/lightmem/topics/ and routes agents through AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md gateway blocks. Hooks maintain session context; skills curate topics.
defaultPrompt: Use LightMem project memory when it is installed in this repo.
